title: SAMVAD Request Envelope
description: Message envelope sent by the caller to POST /agent/message, POST /agent/task, or POST /agent/stream. Authentication is carried in HTTP headers (Content-Digest, Signature-Input, Signature) per RFC 9421 — not in this body.

to.description: agent:// identity of the intended receiver.

skill.description: Skill ID to invoke on the receiving agent.

mode.description: Communication mode. Must match one of the skill's declared modes.

nonce.description: Unique random value for replay prevention. Receivers reject any nonce seen within the last 5 minutes.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Receivers reject messages older than 5 minutes.

traceId.description: Root correlation ID for distributed tracing (OpenTelemetry-compatible). Propagated unchanged across all hops in a multi-agent call.

spanId.description: Unique identifier for this specific hop.

parentSpanId.description: spanId of the caller's own span. Null for the root hop.

delegationToken.description: EdDSA-signed JWT (RFC 8693) granting this agent permission to act on behalf of the token issuer. Null when not delegating.

auth.description: Authentication credentials. Required for 'authenticated' skills; omit or null for 'public' and 'trusted-peers'.

token.description: Bearer token value. Present when scheme is 'bearer'.

callbackUrl.description: For async mode only. URL the receiver POSTs the result to when the task completes. If omitted, the caller must poll.

payload.description: Skill input. Must conform to the skill's declared inputSchema.
